headline: California American Water Encourages Customers to Practice Wise Water Use as Hotter, Drier Summer Conditions Approach
summary: As summer begins in communities, California American Water is encouraging customers to take simple steps to use water more efficiently and help protect local water supplies.

raw.headline: California American Water Encourages Customers to Practice Wise Water Use as Hotter, Drier Summer Conditions Approach
raw.summary: As summer begins in communities, California American Water is encouraging customers to take simple steps to use water more efficiently and help protect local water supplies.

headline: American Water Provides Tips for Conserving Water This Summer
summary: With forecasts predicting a hot, dry summer, American Water (NYSE: AWK), the largest regulated water and wastewater utility company in the U.S., is encouraging customers to take simple steps to conserve water.

raw.headline: American Water Provides Tips for Conserving Water This Summer
raw.summary: With forecasts predicting a hot, dry summer, American Water (NYSE: AWK), the largest regulated water and wastewater utility company in the U.S., is encouraging customers to take simple steps to conserve water.
